subject: Migrate data pipeline output to JSON for Astro
description: Phase 1.3: Modify tools/build.py to also output data/products.json and data/brands.json (structured JSON arrays) alongside existing js/data.js. The JSON files will be consumed by Astro at build time via getStaticPaths(). Keep existing pipeline intact for backward compatibility during migration.
activeForm: Migrating data pipeline to JSON output
